name: AST Code Splitter Improvement Plan
evidence: Plan frontmatter declares status: proposed.
api/data_pipeline.py still imports TextSplitter.
prepare_data_pipeline still constructs TextSplitter(**configs["text_splitter"]).

name: OpsWiki Frontend Refinement Overview
evidence: PLAN-003 and PLAN-004 are implemented in src.
PLAN-005 and PLAN-006 remain not-started.
The legacy src_old/ frontend remains untouched per the overview non-goal.

name: Foundation Design Tokens and App Shell
evidence: Plan frontmatter declares status: implemented.
src/app/globals.css contains only Tailwind imports, the Paper and Ink token set, and base element defaults.
src/app/layout.tsx mounts LanguageProvider and SettingsProvider without ThemeProvider.
src/components/shell/ contains Tailwind-first AppShell, Sidebar, Topbar, Composer, Wordmark, SettingsPanel, IconButton, Switcher, Eyebrow, and DayDivider.
src/messages/en.ts centralizes shell copy while LanguageContext plumbing remains mounted.
Shared renderers, utility connectors, hook, context, types, and the agent-stream route are copied into src with self-contained imports.
bun run lint and bun run build pass with existing warnings only.

sub_tasks.name: Token rewrite of globals.css
sub_tasks.notes: src/app/globals.css registers Paper and Ink tokens plus base element defaults only; wordmark, shell/composer chrome, SettingsPanel chrome, and markdown styles now live in Tailwind utility classes inside src components.

sub_tasks.name: Build shared shell components under src/components/shell/
sub_tasks.notes: Includes AppShell, Sidebar, Topbar, Composer, Wordmark, SettingsPanel, IconButton, Switcher, Eyebrow, and DayDivider.

sub_tasks.name: Copy shared legacy chat and agent-chat connector files into src
sub_tasks.notes: Preserves createChatWebSocket, createAgentChatWebSocket, streamAgentChatHttp, and agentChat types with self-contained src imports.

sub_tasks.name: Introduce SettingsContext and useConversationHistory
sub_tasks.notes: SettingsContext persists opswiki.* settings; useConversationHistory powers the sidebar tree and removes stale deepwiki.* keys on read.

sub_tasks.name: Preserve legacy src_old/ while adding src foundation
sub_tasks.notes: Existing src_old/ pages and components are untouched, matching PLAN-002 and PLAN-003 scope.

name: Welcome and Projects Directory
evidence: Plan frontmatter declares status: implemented.
src/app/page.tsx is 111 lines and renders the OpsWiki welcome route.
src/app/projects/page.tsx is 117 lines and renders the project directory route.
src/components/welcome/* and src/components/projects/* provide the PLAN-004 UI pieces.
src/hooks/useProjectsDirectory.ts owns grouping, filtering, view persistence, alpha-rail state, and delete flow.
src/app/api/wiki/projects/route.ts proxies GET and DELETE for the active src app.
bun run lint and bun run build pass.

sub_tasks.name: Rewrite src/app/page.tsx welcome route
sub_tasks.notes: 111 lines; renders the wordmark, subtitle, scratch input, example grid, /projects link, and welcome keyboard hint.

sub_tasks.name: Create src/app/projects/page.tsx and project directory components
sub_tasks.notes: 117-line route with alpha rail, filter input, grid/list persistence, grouped cards, conversation counts, and delete flow through /api/wiki/projects.

name: Agent Chat Backend API
evidence: Plan frontmatter declares status: implemented.
api/agent/chat_handler.py implements AgentChatRequest, _run_agent_chat, WebSocket, HTTP NDJSON, and agent info handlers.
/ws/agent-chat, /chat/agent-stream, and /agent/info are registered in api/api.py.
src_old/types/agentChat.ts, src_old/utils/agentChatStream.ts, and src_old/app/api/chat/agent-stream/route.ts exist.

sub_tasks.name: Extract shared helpers to api/agent/handler_utils.py
sub_tasks.notes: api/agent/wiki_generator.py imports shared repo/filter/language/send/loop helpers.

sub_tasks.name: Implement AgentChatRequest + _run_agent_chat core
sub_tasks.notes: api/agent/chat_handler.py validates agent/messages, clones the repo, wraps tools, and streams run_agent_loop events.

sub_tasks.name: Add handle_agent_chat_websocket + register /ws/agent-chat
sub_tasks.notes: Untagged events are sent through send_event; route registered in api/api.py.

sub_tasks.name: Add agent_chat_stream (NDJSON) + register /chat/agent-stream
sub_tasks.notes: StreamingResponse uses application/x-ndjson; route registered in api/api.py.

sub_tasks.name: Add get_agent_info + register GET /agent/info
sub_tasks.notes: Returns only wiki, explore, and deep-research agent metadata.

sub_tasks.name: Add WebSocket + HTTP test files
sub_tasks.notes: tests/api/test_agent_chat_websocket.py and tests/api/test_agent_chat_stream.py cover happy and error paths.

sub_tasks.name: Frontend types src_old/types/agentChat.ts
sub_tasks.notes: Discriminated union covers chat-relevant agent events and request payloads.

sub_tasks.name: Extend src_old/utils/websocketClient.ts with createAgentChatWebSocket
sub_tasks.notes: Uses structured onEvent callback against /ws/agent-chat.

sub_tasks.name: Frontend HTTP connector src_old/utils/agentChatStream.ts
sub_tasks.notes: Reads line-buffered NDJSON from /api/chat/agent-stream.

sub_tasks.name: Frontend Next.js proxy src_old/app/api/chat/agent-stream/route.ts
sub_tasks.notes: Proxies to backend /chat/agent-stream with Accept: application/x-ndjson.
